bird.name: 沼泽山雀
bird.summary: 沼泽山雀（學名Poecile palustris），又名小仔伯、仔仔红、红子、小豆雀、唧唧鬼子、泥泽山雀。 生态环境 沼泽山雀虽然名字中有沼泽二字但实际上并不栖息在沼泽中，他们常在针叶林阔叶领或针阔混交林中高大乔木的树冠活动，偶尔也到低矮的灌丛中觅食，在近水源的林区更易见到，这…

relations.subject: 沼泽山雀
relations.evidence: thumb|right|Typical marsh tit habitat in Northamptonshire, England.The marsh tit has a worldwide Extent of Occurrence of around 10 million square kilometres
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 沼泽山雀
relations.evidence: |date=2007 |title=Habitat selection by Marsh Tits Poecile palustris in the UK |journal=Ibis |doi=10.1111/j.1474-919X.2007.00691.x |volume=149 |pages=224–233 |url=http://nora.nerc.ac.uk/id/eprint/1351/2/001351HinsleyIbis_MT07_accepted.pdf |doi-access=free }} It is a widespread and common resident breeder throughout temperate Europe and northern Asia
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
